error.signature: Because every version of package_a depends on package_b ^2.0.0 and package_c depends on package_b ^1.0.0, version solving failed.

verdict.summary: Dart pub cannot resolve a compatible set of package versions. Two or more packages require conflicting versions of a transitive dependency.

dead_ends.action: Use dependency_overrides to force a specific version
dead_ends.why_fails: dependency_overrides bypasses version constraints; the overridden package may be incompatible at runtime causing subtle bugs

dead_ends.action: Pin all packages to exact versions to prevent conflicts
dead_ends.why_fails: Exact version pins prevent receiving security patches and make future upgrades harder

workarounds.action: Run flutter pub outdated and upgrade the conflicting packages
workarounds.how: flutter pub outdated  # shows which packages have newer versions; flutter pub upgrade --major-versions

workarounds.action: Check the dependency tree to find the conflict source
workarounds.how: flutter pub deps  # shows full dependency tree; look for the package with conflicting constraints

workarounds.action: Contact package maintainer or fork the package with updated constraints
workarounds.how: If a package pins an old dependency, fork it temporarily and update the pubspec.yaml constraint
